allow: PowerShell(python -c "import base64, json; header = base64.urlsafe_b64encode\(json.dumps\({'alg':'HS256','typ':'JWT'}\).encode\(\)\).rstrip\(b'='\).decode\(\); payload = base64.urlsafe_b64encode\(json.dumps\({'role':'service_role','iat':1000000,'exp':9999999999}\).encode\(\)\).rstrip\(b'='\).decode\(\); sig = base64.urlsafe_b64encode\(b'fakesig'\).rstrip\(b'='\).decode\(\); print\(f'{header}.{payload}.{sig}'\)")
